## SwitchingSet type

CMAF switching set — tracks that can be seamlessly switched between (same codec, same type).

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare type SwitchingSet = {
    type: MediaType;
    codec: string;
    tracks: Track[];
};
```
**References:** [MediaType](/reference/docs.mediatype)<!-- -->, [Track](/reference/docs.track)
